steps.title: Factor out the known ratio
steps.content:
Rewrite the second ratio so it contains $\frac{x}{y}$.
$$
\frac{30x}{ny}=\frac{30}{n}\cdot\frac{x}{y}
$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve
steps.content: Since $\frac{x}{y}=5$, substitute into the second equation. $$ \frac{30}{n}\cdot5=5 $$ $$ \frac{30}{n}=1 $$ $$ n=30 $$ The answer is 30.
